TeammateShotMessages: No, no, no. Stay with me.
That shot was meant to split us apart.
TeammateDownMessages: No, no, no! Hang on, do not die on me.
I am completely on my own now.
They were right beside me a second ago.
Do not leave me out here alone.
I should have covered them better.
Their silence is louder than the gunshot.
LoneWolfMessages: I have not talked to anyone in days.
I am starting to forget what my own voice sounds like.
No footsteps but mine. That should feel safer than it does.
Being alone keeps me alive, until it does not.
The silence is beginning to feel like company.
I wonder if there is anyone left worth trusting.
FriendlyNearbyMessages: Another set of eyes makes the road feel shorter.
Stay close. Wandering off gets people killed.
I need to keep track of them.
Two people make more noise, but fewer mistakes.
Trust is useful. Dangerous, but useful.
If this goes bad, I am not the only one at risk.
StealthNoiseInfectedNearbyMessages: Too much noise will pull them straight to me.
Slow down. The infected are close enough to hear.
Every step matters when they are this near.
Quiet movement keeps me alive longer than speed.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
StealthNoiseNightMessages: Sound feels louder in the dark.
At night, one bad step can give me away.
I should move like someone is listening.
The dark hides me, but it hides everyone else too.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
StealthNoiseMilitaryMessages: Running through a military zone is asking to be heard.
Slow, quiet, and ready. That is how I leave here.
Noise here travels to the wrong people.
Good gear brings bad company. I should move carefully.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
SanityUneasyMessages: I need to keep my head clear.
Something about this is staying with me.
My hands will not stop shaking.
I should not think about what I have done.
There are lines out here. I can still see them.
SanityUnhingedMessages: Their faces keep coming back when I close my eyes.
I keep hearing things that are not there.
I am still in control. I have to be.
I did what I had to do. That is what I keep telling myself.
Every bad choice feels easier than the last.
SanityPsychoticMessages: The giggling... I can hear it even when I am not laughing.
Their faces. Why do I keep seeing their faces?
Maybe the dead are the only honest ones now.
I do not remember when this started feeling normal.
I should be horrified. I am not.
CannibalismCreepMessages: That was a person. I know that.
There are some hungers that should stay empty.
I can still taste what I should not have eaten.
My stomach accepts what my mind refuses.
The worst part is that it helped.
I crossed something I cannot uncross.
JournalSurvivalInstinctOptions: keeps moving before fear catches up
checks the treeline before the road
JournalKeepsakeOptions: nothing but the clothes they woke up in
a photograph too damaged to recognize
